title: Supreme Court to hear on May 11, PIL to regulate all institutions imparting education to children below 14 years
description: "Take appropriate steps to register, recognise, supervise and monitor all institutions, imparting secular education and/or religious instruction to children up to the age of 14 years in the spirit of Article 21A read with Article 39 (f), 45 and 51-A(k)," The petition stated
